name: Valid Accounts: Cloud Accounts
tactic: Defense Evasion, Persistence, Privilege Escalation, Initial Access
description: Adversaries may obtain and abuse credentials of cloud accounts to maintain persistent access. Cloud accounts are those created and managed by an organization for use by users, remote support, integration, etc. Cloud providers implement logins to cloud management portals and products using various credentials such as passwords, tokens, keys, and MFA.
iocs: Multiple failed logins followed by success
Service principal activity outside business hours
Anonymous proxy or Tor exit node usage
evasion_variants: Use of legitimate cloud management tools
Gradual geographic drift instead of impossible travel
Conditional access policy bypass via compliant device claims
detection_kql_hints: Look for ResultType != 0 clusters followed by 0
Correlate IPAddress with known threat intel
Detect UserAgent anomalies vs user baseline
